name: Bitcoin Data Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  run-script:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout Repo
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Install Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v4
        with:
          python-version: '3.9'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pip install pandas requests

      - name: Run Script
        run: python extract_data.py
